EmailTemplate.description: Send Email to Sourcing for CC Expiring in 3 months
EmailTemplate.name: Send Email to Sourcing for CC Expiring in 3 months
EmailTemplate.subject: {!Broker__c.Name} – Competency Certificate Expiring in 3 Months
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Broker__c.CreatedBy}, This is a gentle reminder that 7 days have passed since the creation of Temporary Channel Partner {!Broker__c.Name}, and the registration process is still pending. Kindly ensure that the registration is completed at the earliest to avoid delays in onboarding, payment, or portal access.
Regards Runwal Enterprises.
